Provider helper for deterministic precomputed text metrics.

## Import

```ts
import { precomputedTextMeasurements } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function precomputedTextMeasurements(opts: PrecomputedTextMeasurementsOptions): Node<Measurements>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `PrecomputedTextMeasurementsOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `Node<Measurements>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { precomputedTextMeasurements } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```
